---
id: aug24-4
name: Every Unsuccessful [Person] Believes X — Every Successful One Does Y
technique: misdirection
platforms: [x]
tags: [polarizing, successful-vs-unsuccessful, cliche, bait-and-switch, mindset]
source_month: "2024-08"
---

## Why It Works

This X post works for a few reasons. First, it uses some pretty polarizing words: "Unsuccessful people" and "successful people" which means people want to understand which bucket they fall into. The way it's written leads the reader to believe that the second line will dispel the first line as untrue — but instead something a bit different is said. Wrapping it up with a statement drives the post home.

## Template

Every unsuccessful [TypeOfPerson] I know believes [SomethingActuallyTrue].
Every successful [TypeOfPerson] knows [TheTrueThing] and [DoesThisToOvercome].
It's cliché as hell, but [ClicheStatement]

## Example

Every unsuccessful athlete I know believes talent is enough to succeed.
Every successful athlete knows talent is just the starting point and puts in countless hours of deliberate practice to overcome their limitations.
It's cliché as hell, but hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
